name: SCHWAB CHARLES CORP
summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation (CSC) and its operating subsidiaries provide financial services. This excerpt is from the company's Insider Trading Policy (Exhibit 19.1) and does not detail specific products or services. The policy governs trading in Schwab Securities by covered persons including directors, executive officers, employees, contingent workers, and associated persons, establishing compliance requirements around material non-public information.
